brief: Build a dashboard showing key business metrics: revenue, users, conversion rate, and growth trends. Each metric should have a label, current value, and trend indicator.
Create a system status page showing the health of multiple services. Each service has a name, status (healthy/degraded/down), uptime percentage, and last checked time. Group services by region.
Build a sales overview showing total revenue, deals closed, pipeline value, and top performers. Include a table of recent deals with client name, amount, stage, and close date.
Create a fitness dashboard showing daily steps, calories burned, active minutes, and heart rate. Display weekly averages and a summary of today's workouts.
Build a contact form with fields for name, email, phone, subject dropdown (support, sales, billing, other), and a message textarea. Include a submit button.
Create a multi-step signup form: step 1 collects name and email, step 2 collects company and role, step 3 shows a summary for confirmation before submitting.
Build a feedback form where users can rate their experience (1-5 stars), select a category (product, support, pricing), and write comments. Show previously submitted feedback below the form.
Create a simple survey with multiple question types: a text input for name, a dropdown for satisfaction level, radio buttons for likelihood to recommend, and a text area for additional comments.
Build a 4-step onboarding wizard: welcome, profile setup, preferences, and completion. Each step has descriptive text and relevant form inputs. Show progress through the steps.
Create a checkout flow with three steps: shipping address form, payment method selection, and order review. Display an order summary sidebar with items and total.
Build a project setup wizard that guides users through naming their project, selecting a template, configuring team access, and reviewing settings before creation.
Create a user management table showing name, email, role, status (active/inactive), and join date. Include action buttons for edit and delete on each row.
Build an inventory table showing product name, SKU, quantity in stock, reorder level, unit price, and warehouse location. Highlight items below reorder level.
Create a user directory with a grid of user cards showing avatar, name, department, email, and phone. Include a search bar and department filter at the top.
Build a leaderboard showing ranked players with their position, name, score, level, and a trend indicator showing if they moved up or down. Show the top 20 players.
Create a todo list app with a text input to add items, a list of existing todos with checkboxes to mark complete, and a counter showing remaining items. Support filtering by status.
Build a habit tracking grid showing 7 days of the week against 5 habits. Each cell is a toggle to mark the habit as done. Show weekly completion rates per habit.
Create an expense tracker with a form to add expenses (description, amount, category, date) and a table showing all expenses with totals by category. Show the overall total.
Build a workout log showing exercises performed today with name, sets, reps, and weight. Include a summary of total volume and a history of recent workouts.
Create a grocery shopping list organized by category (produce, dairy, meat, pantry). Each item has a name, quantity, and checkbox to mark as purchased. Show items remaining count.
Build a reading list tracker showing books with title, author, status (to read, reading, completed), rating, and notes. Group by status and show completion percentage.
Create an application settings page with sections for general settings (language, timezone, theme), notification preferences (email, push, SMS toggles), and privacy controls.
Build a user profile page showing the user's avatar, name, bio, location, and member since date. Include an edit form for updating profile information and a list of recent activity.

Create a notification preferences page with toggle switches for each notification type: account alerts, weekly digest, product updates, marketing, and security alerts. Include frequency options where applicable.
Build an FAQ page with expandable sections for different categories (account, billing, features, technical). Each question expands to show its answer. Include a search input at the top.
Create a changelog page showing version history in reverse chronological order. Each entry has a version number, date, and categorized list of changes (added, changed, fixed, removed).
Build a product roadmap organized by quarters (Q1-Q4). Each quarter contains feature cards with a title, description, status (planned, in progress, done), and priority level.
Create a documentation index page with sections for Getting Started, Guides, API Reference, and FAQ. Each section lists topics as clickable links with brief descriptions.
Build a booking flow: select a service from a list, pick an available date and time slot, enter contact details, and review the booking summary before confirming.
Create a login page with email and password fields, a remember me checkbox, a login button, and links for forgot password and create account. Show an error message area for failed attempts.
Build a password reset flow: step 1 asks for email to send reset link, step 2 has new password and confirm password fields, step 3 shows success with a link back to login.
Create a kanban-style board with columns for To Do, In Progress, Review, and Done. Each column shows task cards with title, assignee, and priority indicator. Show task count per column.
Build a poll widget showing a question with multiple answer options as radio buttons. Display current vote counts and percentages for each option. Include a vote button.
Create a quiz with multiple choice questions shown one at a time. Display the current question number, the question text, answer options as buttons, and navigation to go back or skip.
Build a simple calculator with a display showing the current number and operation. Include number buttons 0-9, basic operations (add, subtract, multiply, divide), equals, and clear.

Create a countdown timer with hours, minutes, and seconds input fields, start/pause and reset buttons, and a large display showing the remaining time. Include preset durations (5, 10, 15, 25 minutes).
Build a pricing page with three tiers: Basic, Pro, and Enterprise. Each tier shows the price, a list of included features, and a call-to-action button. Highlight the recommended tier.
Create a feature comparison table for three products. Rows are features, columns are products. Cells show checkmark, X, or partial. Include a header row with product names and prices.
Build a feature matrix showing available features across different plan tiers. Features are grouped by category (core, advanced, enterprise). Each cell indicates availability or limits.
Create a team directory page organized by department. Each team member shows photo placeholder, name, title, email, and a brief bio. Include department-level metrics like headcount.
Build a notification center showing recent notifications grouped by date (today, yesterday, earlier). Each notification has an icon, title, description, timestamp, and read/unread status.
Create a file browser showing a list of files and folders with name, size, type, and modified date. Include breadcrumb navigation, sort options, and a grid/list view toggle.
Build an activity feed showing recent actions in chronological order. Each entry has a user avatar, action description, target item, and relative timestamp. Group by today, yesterday, this week.
Create a monthly calendar view showing events as colored dots on each day. Below the calendar, show the selected day's events as cards with time, title, location, and description.
Build an email inbox view with a list of emails showing sender, subject, preview text, timestamp, and read/starred status. Include folders sidebar (inbox, sent, drafts, trash) with counts.
Create a chat interface with a message list showing sent and received messages with timestamps and read receipts. Include a message input with send button and typing indicator area.
Build a job board listing positions with title, company, location, salary range, and posted date. Include filters for location, job type, and experience level. Show result count.
Create a recipe page showing the dish name, prep time, cook time, servings, and difficulty level. List ingredients with quantities and step-by-step cooking instructions. Include a nutrition summary.
Build a weather display showing current conditions (temperature, humidity, wind, description) and a 5-day forecast with daily high/low temperatures and condition icons.
Create an event registration form showing event details (name, date, location, description, capacity). Include fields for attendee name, email, ticket quantity, and dietary requirements.
